footer.description: Whakaoho whanaketanga pūmanawa i Sarajevo, Pōngia. Ka hangaia e mātou ngā pūmanawa ritenga, ngā rongoā AI/ML, te hoahoa kapua, me ngā pūnaha aunoatanga.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} Horizon Tech. Kua rāhuitia ngā motika katoa.

header.description: Mai i te whanaketanga pūmanawa umanga me te mōhiohio pakihi ā-AI ki ngā hanganga kapua me ngā rongoā IoT - ka tukua e mātou ngā ratonga hangarau whānui e whakahaere ana i ngā mahi hou me te whakatere i te tipu.
header.trustedBy: E whakawhirinaki ana ki ngā hinonga whakaaro whakamua

caseStudies.title: Ngā Akoranga Kēhi O Nā Tata Nei

blog.title: Ngā Mea Hou Mai i Tā Mātou Rangitaki

innovationLab.title: Taiwhanga Whakahaere Hou
innovationLab.description: Tūhura i ngā tauiratauira, ngā whakamātautau, me ngā kaupapa R&D kua hoatu mai i te tīma pūkaha o Horizon Tech.
